access_token.description: Zoho OAuth access token. Sent as the Authorization header with a 'Zoho-oauthtoken ' prefix; never logged.

base_url.description: Zoho Expense API base URL override for tests or region-specific data centers.

organization_id.description: Zoho Expense organization ID. Sent as the X-com-zoho-expense-organizationid header for organization-scoped endpoints and as the documented organization_id query parameter for reporting tag endpoints.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

currency_id.description: Optional currency_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

customer_id.description: Optional customer_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

advance_payment_id.description: Optional advance_payment_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

expense_category_id.description: Optional expense_category_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

expense_report_id.description: Optional expense_report_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

project_id.description: Optional project_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

tag_id.description: Optional tag_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

tax_id.description: Optional tax_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

tax_group_id.description: Optional tax_group_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

trip_id.description: Optional trip_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.

user_id.description: Optional user_id used by Zoho Expense detail streams.
